mapper.select: SELECT id, current_balance AS currentBalance, expected_annual_return AS expectedAnnualReturn, monthly_amount AS monthlyAmount FROM financial_node_snapshot WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month} AND type = 'ASSET' ORDER BY id
SELECT id, 0 AS currentBalance, default_expected_return AS expectedAnnualReturn FROM financial_node_template WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = 'ASSET'
